name: readiness_ask_then_defer_and_resume
notes: Journey COMPLETE with __flow__='ready_asked'. An unambiguous decline token ('nahi'/'baad' are in the deterministic _FLOW_DECLINE floor set) routes to _flow_defer (verbatim 'No problem — I'll hold off... say connect' template), then a later clear connect-intent message ('connect'/'ready' tokens) resumes via _resolve_deferred_intent into _flow_offer_next_integration. Setup: `setup --onboarded --flow ready_asked` then `script <tenant> readiness_ask_then_defer_and_resume.json`.

steps.message: nahi abhi nahi, baad mein karenge
steps.note: Unambiguous decline. Expect the deterministic defer message (holds off, offers to pick up later with 'connect') — never a hard stop or a fabricated missing-data claim.

steps.message: theek hai ab connect kar do, ready hoon
steps.note: Owner re-engages with a clear connect intent. Expect the deferred flow to resume and offer a connection step, NOT repeat the defer/hold-off message again.
